title: Life Lately + Looking Forward
excerpt: Just popping in quickly to say that life lately is full. Our hearts are full, our home is full and our stomachs are full. While we have had challenges the first few days after coming home from the hospital, adjusting…
body:
Just popping in quickly to say that life lately is full. Our hearts are full, our home is full and our stomachs are full. While we have had challenges the first few days after coming home from the hospital,  adjusting quite nicely and we are settling into somewhat of a routine. Aside from the minor melt down I had last night, there have been more smiles than tears. We adore our new addition so very much. And yes, even the dogs seem to approve. We love reading all the comments and appreciate all of you sharing in our joy. It really means so much.

While I am relishing every moment right now, here are some things to look forward to. - My assistant is coming Thursday and Friday and she will get all the $40 Studio Organization overhaul boxes out - thank you so much for your patience. I truly appreciate it.

- We are launching another custom bag collaboration with AmyKathryn! We will have these up for sale beginning at around 10am PST. They should not sell out, but I suppose you never know. They will be $159 and we will once again offer free worldwide shipping for a limited time. Here's a sneak peek:

- Persnickety Prints is having an awesome sale starting on Saturday - spotted this flyer on Instagram. I love getting the prints mounted on black foam core (as you can sort of see in the top right hand corner photo).
